---
title: "Chaat-GPT"
subtitle: "Gyan(unsolicited), Pedantry(Inevitable), Theories (Optional): Half-baked code and overcooked opinions"
listing:
  contents: posts
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
